title: Replace waiver comments with a new waiver attribute
body:
Add a new attribute that can be used to emit X assignment waivers for memory.
The attribute can be extended to handle other waivers, but currently only supports X-assignment.
The attribute is added to `HWModuleOp`, such that the X-assignment wavier can be enabled for the entire module body.
ExportVerilog, emits the corresponding comment at the module body begin and end.
The waiver attribute is added by the `HWMemSimImpl` pass only when the read enable is not ignored. If the read enable is ignored, then the pass does not generate X assignments.
